title: The Mailbox — Assembly Protocol
description: A page of handwritten instructions developed in the Mission Control back room, specifying exactly how to construct a CO2 scrubber adapter from materials confirmed to be aboard the spacecraft: the cover of the flight manual, two plastic bags from the food supply, a length of suit hose, a sock, and duct tape. Each step is numbered. Step 7 reads: 'Do not seal the final joint until airflow is confirmed — a sealed joint with no flow will make things worse faster.' The instructions were read aloud to the crew over the radio and are now being executed 200,000 miles away.
